design_philosophy.core_loop: Select punch type and direction, block/evade opponent attacks, accumulate damage across three rounds to achieve knockout or decision victory
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time read-and-react gameplay where player must predict opponent punches and respond with appropriate blocking or evasion before counterattacking
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Assume the role of George Foreman at age 43 pursuing undisputed heavyweight champion status by uniting title belts across three fictional boxing circuits
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Severely limited movement and punch variety creates a restrictive, pattern-heavy boxing system; reviewers noted the game actively constrains player options rather than enabling dynamic ringcraft

difficulty.checkpointing: Password system used in career mode to save progress between matches
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Very low—limited dodge options, constrained movement, and overwhelming opponent patterns create high difficulty without adjustable settings documented

progression.unlock_mechanism: Career mode progression through sequential fights against opponents in three fictional boxing circuits, unlocking new opponents upon victory
replayability_hooks: Multiple opponent rosters across fictional circuits
Pursuit of undisputed heavyweight champion title

world_building_techniques: George Foreman celebrity licensing and real boxer representation
Three fictional boxing circuits establishing competitive framework
Progressive portrait damage visualization indicating fight progression

boss_design.philosophy: Sequential opponents in career mode increase difficulty through improved AI punch patterns and defensive adaptation; no traditional 'boss' structure documented—opponents scale in skill

faction_indicators: Three fictional boxing circuits representing different competitive organizations
danger_signals: Progressive visual damage to boxer portraits indicating cumulative damage
Knockdown counter (4 knockdowns = KO; 3 in single round = TKO)
environmental_storytelling: Boxing ring setting with opponent portraits
Health/damage visualization through progressive facial bruising and blood
